title: Tax-loss selling makes these stocks in cannabis, pharma, energy and industrials worth buying
text: In an annual year-end ritual, investors have dumped many of their stock losers to offset taxable gains. This so-called “tax loss selling” can create buying opportunities in promising names.

title: DuPont Recognized as Best ESG Partner by Samsung Electronics
text: WILMINGTON, Del. , Dec. 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- DuPont (NYSE: DD) today announced it has been named the Best Partner in the Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) category by Samsung Electronics.

title: DuPont (DD) Gains on Innovation and Spectrum Plastics Buyout
text: While DuPont (DD) faces headwinds from sluggishness in some markets, it benefits from innovation, the Spectrum Plastics acquisition and pricing and productivity actions.

title: DuPont (DD) Launches Tedlar PVF Solutions and PVF Coating
text: DuPont (DD) collaborates closely with Coryor to launch the printed PVF film solutions on display in the Taipei Building Show.

title: DuPont Launches Printed Tedlar® PVF Solutions and PVF Coating at Taipei Building Show
text: TAIPEI , Dec. 7, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- DuPont (NYSE:DD) today announced that Coryor Surface Treatment Company Ltd. and Nippon Paint Taiwan have introduced a series of new offerings including printed Tedlar® PVF solutions and PVF coating in Taipei Building Show, the largest building materials exhibition in Taiwan.

title: Why You Should Retain DuPont (DD) Stock in Your Portfolio
text: DuPont (DD) gains on its focus on growth though innovation, the Spectrum Plastics acquisition and pricing and productivity actions amid headwinds from the sluggishness in specific markets.

title: DuPont Earns Perfect Score in Human Rights Campaign Foundation's 2023-2024 Corporate Equality Index
text: Receives the Equality 100 Award as a Top Scorer and Leader in LGBTQ+ Workplace Inclusion WILMINGTON, Del. , Dec. 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- DuPont (NYSE: DD) today announced it has received a perfect score of 100 on the Human Rights Campaign Foundation's 2023-2024 Corporate Equality Index (CEI), the nation's foremost benchmarking survey and report measuring corporate policies and practices related to LGBTQ+ workplace equality.

title: Why Is DuPont de Nemours (DD) Up 5% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: DuPont de Nemours (DD) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: DuPont (DD) Attains Full Conversion to Low-GWP Styrofoam
text: DuPont's (DD) joint efforts have considerably reduced the carbon footprint of its Styrofoam portfolio.
